# Copilot Instructions

## Database Schema

- **Do not manually edit `schema_doc.md`**. It is auto-generated by GitHub Actions from the live Supabase schema and will be overwritten on the next run.
- **Always read `schema_doc.md`** to understand the current database structure (tables, columns, types, foreign keys, RLS policies) before making any changes to Supabase migrations, API services, or TypeScript interfaces.

## Migrations

- New database changes must be added as SQL migration files under `supabase/migrations/` using a timestamp-based filename (`YYYYMMDDHHMMSS_description.sql`).
- Never modify existing migration files; always create new ones.
